name: Fatih

skills.name: Only the Strong (Fatih)
skills.description: Enhance Recovery Whenever he uses a skill, gains an enhanced Basic Attack that unleashes sword energy. Enhanced Basic Attacks have higher Attack Speed and restore Health. While using Sacred Tree Blessing, enhanced Basic Attacks unleash 1 additional blast of sword energy.

skills.name: The King's Blade
skills.description: Damage Movement Crowd Control Dashes forward to deal damage. The 3rd skill use also launches the enemy.

skills.name: The King's Return
skills.description: Damage Slow Unleashes sword energy, dealing damage to enemies and slowing them. Recovers Health if he hits a hero. While using Sacred Tree Blessing, he unleashes 1 additional blast of sword energy.

skills.name: Sacred Tree Blessing
skills.description: Enhance Purify Recovery Removes all crowd control effects on himself, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies and gaining max Health. Boosts the effects of Skill 2 and enhanced Basic Attacks while this skill is active. Tap again to end the skill.

tips: Fatih (Warrior): Tier B on international ranked — 51.97% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment.
